grant_title: City to Receive $900,000 in Brownfields Redevelopment Funds
geographic_restrictions: Funds are allocated specifically for the City of Bridgeport, Connecticut, and surrounding areas within the Valley Council of Governments.
project_area: Brownfields redevelopment (contaminated properties cleanup and remediation)
demographic_requirements: No specific demographic requirements mentioned; funds are intended to attract and retain businesses, create jobs, and restore tax-paying properties.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include the City of Bridgeport, state agencies, and organizations within the Valley Council of Governments. Funds will support cleanup activities for petroleum-related and hazardous substances-related projects, with loans and subgrants available for up to 16 shovel-ready projects.
